g.text: N nodes, C features, H horizons
h_temporal → Latent Proj (MLP) → h_for_latent (no ctx leakage)
m_j→i = Σ_c [ norm_c(i,j) · W_c · h_j ] where c ∈ {sp, ctx, lat}
Z ∈ ℝ^{B×N×D} (with residual: Z ← Z + H)
ℒ = ℒ_pred + λ₁ℒ_unique + λ₂ℒ_sparse + λ₃ℒ_ortho + λ₄ℒ_floor
Metrics: MAE, RMSE, R², MAPE (evaluated in original scale)
